The assignment

Questions & Sample Answers

Question 1

[1] "What were people worried about when Bill Gates was a kid?"
 [1] →When Bill Gates was a kid, people were most worried about nuclear war.
 [2] Nuclear War                                                            
 [3] Nuclear war                                                            
 [4] They were worried about nuclear war.                                   
 [5] People were worried about nuclear war.                                 
 [6] They worried about a nuclear war.                                      
 [7] They were concerned about the disaster of a nuclear war. -             
 [8] nuclear wer                                                            
 [9] They worried about nuclear war.                                        
[10] Nuclear disaster                                                       
10 Levels: →When Bill Gates was a kid, people were most worried about nuclear war. ...

Question 2

[1] "What is the greatest risk of global catastrophe now?"
 [1] INFLUENZA ViRUS                                                                
 [2] The greatest risk now is a highly infectious virus.                            
 [3] The greatest risk now is a global pandemic caused by a highly infectious virus.
 [4] Highly infectious virus.                                                       
 [5] It's an epidemic.                                                              
 [6] Highly infectious virus                                                        
 [7]                                                                                
 [8] The risk is that the spread of the virus costs far more people than war.       
 [9] - virus                                                                        
[10]                                                                                
9 Levels:  - virus Highly infectious virus ... The risk is that the spread of the virus costs far more people than war.

Question 3

[1] "What virus does the speaker talk about at length?"
 [1]                                          
 [2] Ebora.                                   
 [3]                                          
 [4] - EBOLA                                  
 [5] He talks about Ebola at length.          
 [6] Ebola                                    
 [7] Ebola                                    
 [8] Ebola.                                   
 [9] It's the Ebola epidemic.                 
[10] He talks about the Ebola virus at length.
8 Levels:  - EBOLA Ebola Ebola. Ebora. ... It's the Ebola epidemic.

Question 4:

[1] "Why did this virus not spread more?"
 [1] Because work by the health workers and the virus didn't get into many urban areas.                                                                            
 [2] This is because of the heroic work of health workers, the nature of the virus, and just luck.                                                                 
 [3] →First, there was a lot of heroic work by health workers. Second, the virus does not spread through the air. Third, it did not get into many urban areas.     
 [4] We were lucky.Did not spread through the air.                                                                                                                 
 [5] Because there was a lot of heroic work by the health worker and this virus does not spread through the air. Also, this virus didn’t get into many urban areas.
 [6] The Ebola virus did not spread more because health workers worked hard, it is not airborne, and it did not reach big cities.                                  
 [7] There are three reasons. Because health workers worked hard, ebola did not spread in the air and it did not go to the city.                                   
 [8] This is because people have useful communication tools like phones, so they can get a lot of information.                                                     
 [9]                                                                                                                                                               
[10] It is because health workers worked hard and nurtured the virus.                                                                                              
10 Levels:  ...

Question 5:

[1] "What suggestions does the speaker make in order to be ready for the next epidemic?"
 [1] -A global alert. Response system.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
 [2] First,we need strong health systems in poor countries. Second,we need a medical corps. Third,we need a pair of medical and military. We need to do simulations. We need to step up research and development.                                                                                                                                                                  
 [3] Tools of telephone need to be put into an overall global health system.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
 [4] The first suggestion is to strengthen the health system. The second is to create a medical corp. The third is to pair medical and military. The fourth is to run a germ game. The five is to improve research and development of science.                                                                                                                                     
 [5] We should strengthen the health system, create medical crops, pair medical and military, run germ games and step up research and development.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
 [6] He makes three suggestions in order to be ready for the next pandemic. Firstly, we need some strong health systems not only in developed countries but also in poor countries. Secondly, we need more people who get training and have knowledge about medical care . Thirdly, we need research and developments of vaccines and diagnostics. -                               
 [7] The speaker suggests building strong healthcare systems, training medical workers, working with the military, doing simulations, and investing in vaccines and research.                                                                                                                                                                                                      
 [8] First, strengthen health systems in poor countries. Mother can give birth safely and children can be vaccinated. Second, we need to create a medical corps. Third, to pair medical people with the military. We use the mobility of the military to quickly isolate the influenced area. Fourth, to run germ games Finally, we also need to step up research and development..
 [9] It is like strong health systems for the country, creating a medical corps, pairing medical and military, running germ games and step research and development.                                                                                                                                                                                                               
[10] He says improving healthcare systems, training medical workers, preparing for epidemics, and working together internationally.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
10 Levels: -A global alert. Response system. ...


Summaries

five sample summaries

[1] When Bill Gates was a kid, worried about nuclear war,but now people worry about viruses.We must be ready for the next academic. There are ways to prepare for the next academic. We need medical teams to be ready to go and prepare people. There is no treatment process .We have to figure out what tool should be used. We should be concerned about advances in science and technology.What we need is five. There are strong health systems for the country to keep good for mother and children, create a medical corps, pair medical and military, run germ games and step research and development.                     
[2]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
[3] In the modern world, viruses are a big concern among people. When Ebola hit the world, the virus caused heavy damage to us because we didn't have enough data, medical team and treatment method. However, in 2015, Ebola didn’t spread due to hard work by medical people and development in science. So,what should we do to prepare for the next epidemic? Bill Gates advocated strengthening health systems, creating a model corps, connecting medical people with the military running games and stepping up research and development.                                                                                     
[4] Long ago, we were afraid of nuclear war, but now, the most terrifying disaster is an epidemic because we don’t have a response system to the virus.When the epidemic of Ebora, Many people died because we were not prepared in advance. Fortunately, it did not spread to urban areas, it did not result in an explosive infection. In order to be ready for the next epidemic, we should strengthen the health system, create medical crops, pair medical and military, run germ games and step up research and development.                                                                                                   
[5] Bill Gates says the next global threat may not be nuclear war, but highly infectious virus. When the Ebola outbreak occurred, the world lacked sufficient organizations to contain its spread.There are several necessary measures we need to take strong health systems in poor countries, medical reserve corps,pairing those medical people with the military, simulating germs games, and lots of advanced R&D in areas of vaccines and diagnostics. He believes that achieving these goals may require enormous funds, but they are essential to prevent economic losses to banks and other institutions, and to save lives.
5 Levels:  ...

Opinions

five sample opinions

[1] I think that Bill Gates idea of preparing for the next epidemic was really effective.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
[2] I think that viruses are more scary than world war. To stop and solve the war we should conversation, but to finish virus we can not anything. We are not ready for the next academic. We can not guess and know the next academic, but we can move it to decrease total deaths and think about what we can do for it.
[3] I agree with his opinion. I think nuclear war is still a big problem, but also viruses are a more important problem. If we have some ways to prepare for the next epidemic, we should do it. I want to do what I can do to prepare for the next one.                                                                  
[4] I think we also need individual efforts to prepare for the pandemic.Both national effortsand individual efforts are necessary.                                                                                                                                                                                        
[5]
